submission.description: Sixtyfour is the app-store front door for the Sixtyfour people-intelligence and company-intelligence API. It gives an agent contact discovery (find email / find phone), reverse lookups from an email or phone, full person and company enrichment, and an agentic QA researcher that answers free-form questions about a person or company. All returned as clean structured JSON, every field source-backed.

methods.name: sixtyfour.people_intelligence
methods.description: People Intelligence: full, source-backed enrichment of a person from seed details.

params.name: lead_info
params.description: Seed details for the person, e.g. {"name":"Jane Doe","company":"Acme"}

params.name: struct
params.description: Desired output fields as {field: description}, e.g. {"title":"current job title"}

methods.name: sixtyfour.company_intelligence
methods.description: Company Intelligence: full, source-backed company profile, optionally with people.

methods.name: sixtyfour.find_email
methods.description: Contact discovery: find a verified email for a person from partial details.

params.name: lead
params.description: Person details to resolve, e.g. {"name":"Jane Doe","company":"Acme"}

methods.name: sixtyfour.find_phone
methods.description: Contact discovery: find a phone number for a person from partial details.

methods.name: sixtyfour.reverse_email
methods.description: Reverse lookup: identify the person and company behind an email address.

methods.name: sixtyfour.reverse_phone
methods.description: Reverse lookup: identify the person and company behind a phone number.

methods.name: sixtyfour.enrich_linkedin
methods.description: Enrich a person directly from their LinkedIn profile URL.

methods.name: sixtyfour.qa
methods.description: Agentic QA researcher: answer free-form qualification questions about a person or company, with sources.

params.name: data
params.description: The entity to research (person or company details)

params.name: qualification_criteria
params.description: Array of {criteria_name, description} objects, e.g. [{"criteria_name":"public_company","description":"Is this company publicly traded?"}]

methods.name: sixtyfour.research_agent
methods.description: Research agent: autonomous multi-step research over an entity, returning structured findings with sources.

methods.name: sixtyfour.filter_search
methods.description: Filter Search: structured field-based search across the corpus; returns matching entities.

params.name: simple_filters
params.description: Field filters (string/number/bool values), e.g. {"industry":"Financial Services"}. See /search/filter-capabilities for fields.

methods.name: sixtyfour.deep_search
methods.description: Deep Search (agentic): start a natural-language search. Returns a task_id; results are retrieved asynchronously (see caveats).

params.name: query
params.description: Natural-language search, e.g. "Series B fintech companies in NYC"

listing.tagline: People- and company-intelligence: contact discovery, enrichment, and agentic research.
listing.app_description: Sixtyfour is the app-store front door for the Sixtyfour people-intelligence and company-intelligence API. Contact discovery (find email / find phone), reverse lookups from an email or phone, full person and company enrichment, an agentic QA researcher, a research agent, and filter/deep search — all returned as clean, structured, source-backed JSON. Pilot brokers one managed key and meters usage per agent.
